data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for optional cap/base rate policy enforcement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Optional cap/base rate policy enforcement', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but it does not confirm that the system currently supports or implements this feature. Therefore, the evidence is inconclusive regarding the satisfaction of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that optional cap/base rate policy enforcement is implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
